title: 孤高でいるのも楽じゃない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm about to eat lunch in my office,
when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Why do you have to be here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If I can't stay here, the only other place is behind
the gym...
choice_data_list: Something I can help you with?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You can let me be by myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Classrooms, the plaza, the roof... There's people
everywhere. I can't get any peace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grasping the situation, I decide to move myself
to a cafe, when...
